qa_pairs.question: What are the key characteristics of the self-paced courses developed by the technical staff?
qa_pairs.answer: These self-paced (or self-directed) courses can be taken at any time and allow learners to proceed at their own pace. They include quizzes and/or assignments, and upon successful completion, a Certificate of Completion for the course is awarded.

qa_pairs.question: Is an Alliance account a mandatory requirement for all the self-paced courses listed?
qa_pairs.answer: No, an Alliance account is not a mandatory requirement for all courses; some courses require it, while others are either optional or state 'No (recommended)'.
